---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="container" style="padding: 1rem 0 0;">
  <p class="section-label">Blog</p>
  <p style="color: var(--text-muted); max-width: 600px; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
    Writing about concept drift, data streams, sports analytics, and the intersection 
    of statistics and machine learning.
  </p>
</div>
```
